decisions.title: Choose the first external publication adapter after the promoted leadership-digest path
decisions.why_now: The current named baseline is now fully promoted, so the next decision is which external publication surface should prove the same governed research distribution contract first.

options.label: Design SharePoint first
tradeoffs: Matches the repo's existing document-publication direction for enterprise PM teams
Leaves Confluence and site-export behavior for later proof cycles

options.label: Design Confluence first
tradeoffs: Aligns with common cross-functional documentation flows
Requires more metadata and sync-boundary clarification in one cycle

options.label: Design site export first
tradeoffs: Keeps the publication surface repo-native and easier to verify
Does not exercise enterprise knowledge-base sync behavior directly

decisions.consequence_of_delay: The fully promoted baseline will stay internal-first even though the next likely leverage gain sits in publication adapters and broader packaging.
